title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates six skills for maximizing Claude productivity: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement, advisory collaboration, user testing, and compound engineering. The approach is illustrated through building a fitness trainer project and emphasizes methodical workflow for 10x project output.
